PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse "C:\\Starvia_Express\\apps\\customer\\android\\app\\build\\generated" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Extension -in ".kt", ".java" } | Select-Object FullName | head -30)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse "C:\\Starvia_Express\\apps\\customer\\node_modules\\expo-modules-autolinking\\android\\expo-gradle-plugin\\expo-autolinking-plugin" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { !$_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName | Select-Object -First 20)
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', d.get\('version'\)\); print\('peerDeps:', d.get\('peerDependencies'\)\)")
PowerShell(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); mods=d.get\('modules',{}\); print\('Modules:', list\(mods.keys\(\)\)[:20]\)" 2>&1)
PowerShell(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k: d[k] for k in ['version','main','exports','react-native'] if k in d}, indent=2\)\)" 2>&1)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "c:\\Starvia_Express\\apps\\customer\\node_modules\\expo-modules-core" -Recurse | Where-Object { !$_.PSIsContainer } | ForEach-Object { $content = Get-Content $_.FullName -Raw -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($content -match "Exported view managers"\) { $_.FullName } } | Select-Object -First 5)

PowerShell($timeout = 120; $elapsed = 0; while \($elapsed -lt $timeout\) { Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $elapsed += 5; $status = \(& "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe" -s emulator-5556 get-state 2>&1\); if \($status -eq "device"\) { Write-Host "Emulator ready!"; break } else { Write-Host "Still booting... \($elapsed s\)" } })

PowerShell(& "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe" -s emulator-5556 emu kill 2>&1; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; & "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe" devices 2>&1)

PowerShell($timeout = 120; $elapsed = 0; while \($elapsed -lt $timeout\) { Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $elapsed += 5; $out = \(& "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe" devices 2>&1\) -join "`n"; $ready = $out -match "emulator-5556\\s+device"; if \($ready\) { Write-Host "Pixel_7a is online!"; break } else { Write-Host "Waiting... \($elapsed s\)" } })

PowerShell($timeout = 180; $elapsed = 0; while \($elapsed -lt $timeout\) { Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; $elapsed += 8; $boot = \(& "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe" -s emulator-5556 shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>&1\); if \($boot -match "1"\) { Write-Host "Boot complete!"; break } else { Write-Host "Booting... \($elapsed s\) status: $boot" } })
